description: A daily inspirational quote on your e-ink display. Fetches live quotes from DummyJSON and ZenQuotes, with Quotable as a tagged backup.

fields.label: Font
fields.help: Font family for the quote text.

fields.label: Refresh
fields.help: How often to fetch a new quote (daily = 86400).

fields.label: Category
fields.help: Filter by tag when Quotable is available, e.g. wisdom, inspirational, love. Leave blank for any.
